action_items.action: URGENT [CARRIED] — Reply to Jessica Dordevic DM: Still waiting on banner sign-off. Last message 30 Apr 15:17 BST ('I can't use that green container. it's actually a clock 😄'). No new messages today. Jessica is paused on GDCU-8928 IUJ Banners until Mike confirms the banner designs are approved. Respond before EOD so she can progress first thing Tuesday.

REVIEW [CARRIED] — GDCU-8895 Prediction Market Page Not on US Sitemap (Sanja Budic, High, In Product). No movement since morning. Sanja's implementation is complete: Prediction header on US sitemap, /us/prediction-markets linked, Prediction Reviews logic in place. Compliance requirement: must NOT appear under 'Betting' headers. Colin Brannigan is stakeholder. Review and sign off today or first thing Tuesday.

ESCALATE TODAY [CARRIED+WORSENING] — GDCU-8619 Operator List Redesign is now Day 19 Blocked (since 16/04/2026). No movement all day despite Novica being active on other tickets. This has crossed into a second sprint with zero progress. Escalate to Colin Brannigan today or first thing Tuesday — do not let this roll into a third sprint.

DECISION [CARRIED] — Respond to Joshua Smith's #gdc-product-design-pod post (01/05): Design direction needed for GDCU-8787 Carousel Banner Shortcode. Option A: reuse Simple Banner shortcode + navigation arrows (Joshua's preference, reduces editor complexity). Option B: Free Games banner style (different layout, cannot reuse shortcode). Joshua is waiting on Mike's call before progressing.

PREP [CARRIED] — Miguel Migneco is off tomorrow Tuesday 05/05. Ensure nothing in the In Product queue is blocked waiting on him. GDCU-8512 (Always On Betting Tips) is Done. Confirm GDCU-8813 Ace Navigation UI Audit sign-off status before he's away.

CREATE TICKET [NEW — from Chloe DM 30/04, not in morning report] — Mike committed to Chloe on 30 Apr that he would create a ticket for the FTP World Cup game. No evidence this was created over the long weekend. Chloe explicitly flagged 'anything WC related' as current priority (alongside Cosmo reskin and Group Bets). Create the FTP WC game ticket today before the team is back on Tuesday.

DESIGN GAP [NEW — from Chloe DM 30/04, not in morning report] — Chloe flagged: 'the Tinder and Ace audit still have no dev-ready designs, and you don't have the Ace assistant shortcode UX ticket in any of the next cycles.' Two issues: (1) GDCU-8813 Ace Navigation UI Audit has no dev-ready designs — check with Jessica/Miguel. (2) Ace assistant shortcode UX ticket may be missing from upcoming sprint cycles — verify with Chloe on Tuesday.

WELCOME BACK [CARRIED] — Vic Dadson returns tomorrow Tuesday 05/05 from ~2 weeks sick leave. Plan a brief check-in for Tuesday morning. Key topic: data engineering options (Mike briefed her 23 Apr re: Chris in BI team, clear reqs to Nemanja). Review her backlog tonight so she can hit the ground running.

SIGN OFF [CARRIED] — GDCU-8736 Learning Hub Imagery (Ciara Carroll, Medium, In Product since 28/04 — Day 6). Ciara shared Figma prototype including new Myth Buster tile. Mike's approval unblocks Carlos Blauth on GDCU-8733. Chloe noted 'some back and forth' at sprint close 30 Apr. Confirm outstanding feedback with Ciara and sign off.

CHECK IN [CARRIED] — GDCU-8546 Tinder Style Offer Match (Jessica Dordevic, In Progress). No new messages today. Jessica was making updates per Mike's 30 Apr direction (hide pass/interested buttons after match, remove 'betting' label). Chloe expected Jessica to close this shortly. Confirm with Jessica on Tuesday whether she's ready for In Product.

ACKNOWLEDGE [CARRIED] — Ciara Carroll's Claude Design Guidelines post in #core-product (29 Apr 15:49 BST) is the key deliverable from GDCU-8893 (Done). Ciara asked Mike on 30 Apr: 'Hoping the announcement came across well and we get feedback!' Mike should publicly endorse across #core-product and #gdc-product-design-pod — Ciara's DM shows she's keen for Mike's visible backing.

FOLLOW UP [CARRIED] — GDCU-8879 Genesis Brand Carousel Component Card (Jessica Dordevic, In Progress). Carried into new sprint after being bounced from In Product on 29 Apr. Outstanding: confirm logo name/size sourced from Origins (Chloe's feedback). Check with Jessica on Tuesday where this stands.

MONITOR [NEW — status changes this afternoon] — Positive Jira activity today despite bank holiday: GDCU-8877 Phone Numbers Admin Panel moved to In QA (11:11 BST), GDCU-7363 Slots Widget Minor Filter Issues moved to In QA (13:15 BST), GDCU-8611 Update Feature Tag moved to In Progress (13:19 BST). All Novica Vukobratovic. No PM action needed — note for sprint velocity.

DM GABRIEL [CARRIED] — Gabriel Cornoiu posted in #gdc-pdmt on 01/05: 'I'm free most of the morning, send me a DM if you want to discuss anything.' Outstanding questions from 23 Apr remain unanswered: (1) 'Other' option behaviour in offer ordering dropdown, (2) 'new OpList' clarification. Flag for first thing Tuesday.

CREATIVE DIRECTION [CARRIED] — GDCU-8846 Cosmo Spins Spring Ad Campaign (Ciara Carroll, To Do). Josh Kerr feedback: needs rethinking — clearer message, less 'gaming' feel. Chloe flagged WC-related items (FTP game, Cosmo reskin, Group Bets) as current priority. Creative direction from Mike needed before Ciara can proceed.
